extracted_codes.context: Morphine Rxnorm P1-95521 - listed in Table 1. Analgesics Terms for OPIOIDS
Codeine RxNorm C0009214 - listed in Table 1. Analgesics Terms for OPIOIDS

clinical_criteria: Patient must have undergone at least one surgical procedure as identified by ICD-9 or ICD-10 codes
Documentation of multimodal regimen use postoperatively around discharge date
Medication list must include opioids in combination with NSAID and/or acetaminophen for cases
Controls must have surgical procedure but NOT receive multimodal regimen at discharge
algorithm_summary: This phenotype identifies surgical patients receiving multimodal analgesia (combination of opioids with NSAIDs and/or acetaminophen) at discharge. Cases are defined as patients with: 1) ICD-9/ICD-10 surgical procedure codes, 2) documented multimodal regimen use postoperatively, 3) documentation in EHR around discharge date, and 4) medication orders for multimodal analgesics. Controls have surgical procedures but do not receive multimodal regimens at discharge. The algorithm requires mapping medications to RxNorm codes and extracting both structured and unstructured EMR data including procedure codes, encounter dates, and medication orders.
